[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111010000 4
1 0000000000 a
2 0011010000 3
3 1101000000 3
4 0010010101 4
5 1111000100 5
6 0010110100 4
7 0010000000 1

01 10 0010000000 1 match 7

70 07 0010100000 2

60 06 0010000000 1 match 7
